title: citrus × sinensis subsp. hierochuntica
intro: Citrus × sinensis subsp. hierochuntica is a citrus plant that is a subspecies of the sweet orange (Citrus sinensis), native to the Middle East and North Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections, due to its high content of flavonoids and limonoids. The plant's extracts have been found to have various health benefits, such as lowering cholesterol levels, improving blood circulation, and possessing antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of Citrus × sinensis subsp. hierochuntica, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, are often used in traditional medicine to support cardiovascular health and boost the immune system.
